        fpath = os.path.join(root, fname)
        with open(fpath, "r") as f:

            r'\1\n' + imports,
            new_content,
            count=1,
            flags=re.MULTILINE
        )

        with open(fpath, "w") as f:
            f.write(new_content)
        files_processed += 1
        print(f"Processed: {fpath}")

print(f"\nTotal files processed: {files_processed}")
